content.en:
It is not at all unexpected that this Eternal Dao Realm was killed, if it was so easy to succeed in smuggling, then all the Eternal Dao Realm would have been smuggled.

But this is impossible, without the permission of the Eternal Realm Boundary Court, without obtaining the quota to enter the realm of the Realm God Realm, it is impossible to enter, once you forcibly break in, you will be directly wiped out.

Therefore, this Eternal Supreme Dao Realm who was killed was really stupid.

Of course, he may also have been thinking about luck.

Thundered!!!!

Soon, the kingdom of all gods completely entered the realm of the gods, and the place where the kingdom of all gods was originally located had become a death zone.

When the crack disappeared, many Eternal Dao Realms left one by one.

Ye Tian also returned to the Endless Realm.

Now, for the eternal kingdom in this region, the kingdom of the gods is history, and this place is not qualified to be called the kingdom of all gods alliance.

Of course, the Nine Poles Alliance is still there, and some high-level leaders are still there, so they will join forces with each other so that they will not be unable to deal with some special situations.

And.

Ye Tian was still guarding the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, so the other Eternal Dao Realm powerhouses were not panicking.

......

Another long time has passed.

927 At this time, these dozens of eternal realms have gradually adapted to the new life, and for many eternal realms, there is no kingdom of all gods, and there is no impact.

Demon Seed Abyss.

Ye Tian was also trying to find a way to quickly refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, after all, at his current speed, the refining was too slow, and he was afraid that he would have to take trillions of Dao Era as a unit to gradually reach the level of the original Demon Seed Abyss refining.

Therefore, he has been trying to find a way to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar quickly, even at any cost.

After a long period of continuous deduction and research, Ye Tian finally created a Dao Seed Secret Technique, which could speed up the refining of the Eternal Demon Pillar, but it would consume the potential and foundation of the Eternal Dao Seed, and even scrap the Eternal Dao Seed.

But.

Ye Tian didn't care, he could condense a duplicate body, frantically perform this kind of Dao secret technique, and sacrifice these duplicate bodies, if he could refine the Eternal Demon Pillar as soon as possible, it would naturally be worth it.

"This Dao Secret Technique is called Eternal Dao Alchemy!"

Ye Tian used the Eternal Alchemy Technique to begin refining the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Eternal Dao Seed was rapidly depleted, just like a balloon deflated, and it was shrinking.

However, the refining speed of the Eternal Demon Pillar had increased countless times.

"This Dao Variety Secret Technique is so awesome that it deserves to make me use the Ruin Sun Disc to constantly deduce and create, sacrificing a lot of replica bodies. Ye Tian muttered.

After a period of time, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies was scrapped, but he let another replica body perform the Eternal Alchemy Technique to continue refining the Eternal Demon Pillar.

In this way, Ye Tian's refining degree of the Eternal Demon Pillar was getting higher and higher, and with such a fast speed, it was naturally not difficult for him to surpass the refining level of the Demon Seed Linyuan.

When the time comes, his Eternal Dao Seed will accept the tempering of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and he will also be able to reach his current limit faster.

Time flies, and unconsciously, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's refining degree of the Eternal Demon Pillar was already comparable to that of the original Demon Seed Linyuan, and the effect of his current refining by the Eternal Demon Pillar was naturally far beyond before, and he could sense that the Eternal Dao Seed was becoming stronger in his breath.

"Soon, I can feel that the Eternal Dao Seed is about to reach its limit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Once the Eternal Dao Seed refining reached its limit, he could begin to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed and impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian obviously felt that the improvement of the Eternal Dao Seed was getting lower and lower, it was not that the effect of the Eternal Demon Seed was not good, but that his Eternal Dao Seed was almost reaching its limit.

"I can't improve at all, and I've reached my current limit!"

At this time, if he didn't impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, then the Eternal Dao Seed would almost be able to ascend.

And the difficulty of his solidifying the Eternal Dao Seed was definitely much greater than that of other half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms, after all, his Eternal Dao Seed was much larger than the Eternal Dao Species of other Eternal Realm Divine Realms, and it was hardly a grade.

Someone else's eternal seed may be an apple, and he is a basketball, that's how it is described.

Therefore, others only need to solidify such a small Eternal Dao Seed, but the Eternal Dao Seed he solidifies is too big and difficult, and it will naturally take more time.

However, if he was successfully solidified, his strength would far surpass that of other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses!

this day.

Ye Tian practiced in retreat in the Endless Realm, impacting the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm.

As long as a little curing is done, it is a breakthrough.

Solidifying the Eternal Dao Seed is usually slowly solidified, if you want to step into it to complete the solidification, you can only cultivate the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, but Ye Tian does not have this kind of Solidification Secret Technique, and even the other half-step Eternal Realm God Realms of the Nine Extremes Alliance do not have the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique.

Maybe the Lord of Qinhe has the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, but it is estimated that it is also the kind of spicy chicken Solidification Secret Technique, otherwise the cultivation speed of the Lord of Qinhe will not be so slow.

Ye Tian didn't know anything about the solidification secret technique, so he couldn't obtain the Eternal Dao Kind solidification secret technique for the time being, and he didn't even have a direction for deduction.

"Slowly solidify yourself first, as long as you step into the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, then go and find the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian kept trying to solidify, little by little.

The power of the Supreme Dao rules of the Eternal Dao Seed is actually changing all the time, and solidification is to make it no longer change, as long as it does not change, it is not easy to affect the Eternal Dao Seed, and the probability of demon seed transformation is naturally extremely low.

"The difficulty of solidification is very high, fortunately, my Eternal Dao Seed is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and there is no problem of demon seeding, and other Eternal Dao body consummation powerhouses, even if the Eternal Dao Seed is promoted to a certain level, they are qualified to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, but they also have to be careful of the problem of the Demon Seed, which will hinder the solidification. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So.

If he is initially solidified, it will be much easier.

The years of the 300 million solstice era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed had finally completed the initial solidification, and a small area of the Eternal Dao Seed had completed the solidification, thus causing the transformation of cultivation.

Rumble!!!!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation is transforming from the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, which is the sublimation of cultivation, the transformation of the realm, and the skyrocketing of strength.

After a long time, Ye Tian completely stepped into the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

At this moment, his strength skyrocketed!
